purpose: Classify whether an AIMO next_action_candidate has any execution authority. This passport grants evaluation only; it does not execute actions.

LAB_FILE_WRITE.required_proof: lab proof/report; no active memory mutation; no live process launch
LAB_FILE_WRITE.boundary: may prepare install-ready artifacts or proof files only; cannot execute patch/live action

OWNER_LIVE_ACTION_AUTHORITY.required_proof: preflight, rollback, execution log, validation report, return-to-parent proof
OWNER_LIVE_ACTION_AUTHORITY.boundary: blocked until explicit Owner decision and surface-specific passport exist

PROTECTED_MEMORY_MUTATION.required_proof: full active memory backup, manifest/index/cells hashes, rollback proof, post-write validator
PROTECTED_MEMORY_MUTATION.boundary: default denied; direct active memory writes are not allowed through AIMO action candidate layer

grant_rules.when: required_authority=LAB_FILE_WRITE and action_type in class allowed_action_types and validator_refs/proof/rollback present
